REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR ON APR-26-2021 - APPEARANCES VIA COURTCALL BY MICHAEL ADAMS, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF; FRANCISCO RODRIGUEZ, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT'S BANKRUPTCY FILING WAS REJECTED BY THE CLERK'S OFFICE. THE COURT VACATED THE TRIAL DATE AND SET A CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE FOR SEP-01-2021 AT 10:30AM IN DEPT. 610 FOR STATUS OF BANKRUPTCY STAY/FILING OF NOTICE OF BANKRUPTCY. THE COURT INSTRUCTED DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL TO COMPLETE THE FILING OF THE NOTICE OF BANKRUPTCY STAY. NOTICE OF CMC SENT BY COURT. PARTIES WAIVED NOTICE. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206/SKF)

MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF JUL-05-2022 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON JUL-05-2022 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 504, JUDGE GARRETT L. WONG. MICHAEL EDWARD ADAMS, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF VIA COURTCALL. FRANCISCO RODRIGUEZ, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT. PARTIES TO CONTACT DEPT. 504 NO LATER THAN 4:00 PM TODAY VIA THE E-MAIL ADDRESS PROVIDED TO THEM AT TRIAL CALL. THE COURTROOOM CLERK'S TELEPHONE NUMBER WAS ALSO PROVIDED TO THE PARTIES. TIME ESTIMATE: 1/2 - 1 DAY. JUDGE: SAMUEL FENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
